title: Electrical Design Engineer / Assistant Design Engineer (Electrical)
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $ 2800 to $4300 + AWS + VB
  • Working Location: Tuas, Singapore (Company Transport Provided at Bukit Batok; CCK & Boon Lay)
  • Working Hours (Monday to Friday 8:15am to 5:45pm)
  • TRAINING PROVIDED

Job Responsibilities:

  • Prepare material requisition lists for job requirements.
  • Plan and design electrical switchboards, consoles and control panels according to customer's requirements and company’s standards.
  • Prepare approval drawings, shop drawings, final drawings / documents, short circuit calculations, instruction manuals as required for submission to clients and shop floor production.
  • Co-ordinate with clients and consultants on the technical requirements. Attend technical discussions with clients and consultants when required.
  • Feedback to Sales & Marketing Department on the changes of technical requirements by clients for claims of additional costs and time.
  • Check and follow-up on design and shop drawings with production departments.
  • Develop and improve on design of electrical switchboards, consoles and control panels. While taking note of quality, standard, cost-effective designs are to be considered.
  • Assist and advise Sales & Marketing Department on technical matters, provide technical backup for securing of contracts.
  • Carry out other responsibilities as and when assigned by the superiors.
  • Follow the procedures of design control, documentation and data control, and quality system of the total Quality Management System 

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Electrical Engineering or Marine Engineering
  • Conversant with AutoCAD Electrical / Solidworks
  • Training will be provided for candidate with lesser experience

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492
